title: Distributors
description: The organization(s) responsible for distributing the data collection.

organization.title: Organization
organization.description: Name and other details about the organization that distributes the data collection.

order.title: Order
order.description: The order of importance for the distributors of the data collection.
order.usageNotes: A value of '0' indicates the primary distributor, '1' the second, and so forth.
